FOR DEFENDANTS STEINER COURT LLC, FP INVESTMENTS, INC. MARVIN FRANKEL, MEGHAN WALKER -- CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON DEC-07-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE THE HONORABLE CURTIS KARNOW IN DEPT. 611. PARTIES TO CONTACT JUDGE KARNOW BY 3:00 PM TODAY TO SET UP THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-15-2020 - HELD AND DID NOT SETTLE.

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-07-2020. ***CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.*** THOMAS DROHAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARINA FRANCO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
